concept: Match Game: Players drop various fruit types from the top of the screen into a container by tapping the desired drop location, causing identical adjacent fruits to merge into a larger, higher-tier fruit. The game's physics engine dictates how fruits fall and settle, with the primary rule being that two identical fruits merge upon contact to form the next fruit in a predetermined sequence, and the game ends if the fruit stack reaches the top boundary.
name: Fruit Merge: Match Game
